ksa_text: Conduct data platform security assessments, including vulnerability scanning, access control audits, encryption verification, and remediation of identified security gaps in data infrastructure.

dcwf.top_element_label: Support necessary compliance activities (e.g., ensure system security configuration guidelines are followed, compliance monitoring occurs).

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data administration policies and procedures

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-T-012 (DA, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4182 is insufficient to establish relevance to self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.418, eu_ai_act=0.406, dcwf=0.400) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4182 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DA-domain KSA DA-T-012 (composite 0.4182) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4182 for DA domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Citizen Data Scientist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DA domain KSA at composite 0.4182 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4182, domain DA, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
